summary: Tested Team Members CRUD, Projects CRUD with loading states, Admin Sidebar restructuring, and About page team section. All backend APIs pass (16/16 tests). Frontend UI verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Team Members CRUD is properly implemented with loading states (saving/deleting spinners)
Projects page has proper loading states with Loader2 spinner during save/delete operations
Admin sidebar correctly restructured into 9 logical groups with collapsible sections
TeamSection.tsx dynamically fetches from /api/team-members and falls back to hardcoded data if API fails
All admin pages use proper authentication via verifyToken() dependency
seed_data_creation: 7 team members pre-seeded in database with images and roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Members CRUD fully working: /api/team-members (public), /api/admin/team-members (CRUD). Projects CRUD has loading states via saving/deleting state variables. Admin sidebar has 9 grouped navigation sections. All data-testid attributes properly implemented on Team Members admin page.

team_members_api.DELETE /api/admin/team-members/{id}: PASS - Deletes member, returns 404 for non-existent

admin_ui.projects_page: PASS - Table with Edit/Delete buttons, Add Project modal
admin_ui.team_members_page: PASS - Grid layout with member cards, Edit/Delete buttons, Add modal with data-testid attributes
admin_ui.sidebar_navigation: PASS - 9 grouped sections: Overview, Leads & CRM, Content, Products & Services, Smart Home Systems, Website, SEO & Localization, Marketing & Testing, System

about_page_team_section.displays_members: PASS - All 7 team members shown with photos, names, roles
about_page_team_section.fallback_data: PASS - TeamSection.tsx has fallback array if API fails

loading_states.project_save_button: PASS - Shows Loader2 spinner and 'Saving...' text during save
loading_states.project_delete_button: PASS - Shows Loader2 spinner during delete, button disabled
loading_states.team_member_save: PASS - Shows Loader2 spinner during save
loading_states.team_member_delete: PASS - Shows Loader2 spinner during delete
